# F032 Floor-Preserving JEPA Residual Calibration

## Decision
`F032_NONZERO_RESIDUAL_DISCARDED_HELDOUT_BELOW_LOCAL_FLOOR`

## Purpose
F031 passed the protected Tier 2 gates but failed to preserve the same-representation train-only ridge floor. F032 wraps the real JEPA predictor in a floor-preserving calibration rule: start exactly at the local train-only ridge floor and only add the JEPA residual if train-only calibration preserves transition, delta cosine, and recall.

## Mean Metrics
- selected residual scale mean: `0.190000`
- selected nonzero fraction: `1.000000`
- heldout local floor preserved: `False`
- selected transition: `0.336264`
- local floor transition: `0.333054`
- direct JEPA transition: `0.302066`
- selected delta cosine: `0.918891`
- local floor delta cosine: `0.912222`
- selected recall@1: `0.874074`
- local floor recall@1: `0.859259`
- selected floor gap transition: `0.003209` (min `-0.000221`)
- selected floor gap delta cosine: `0.006669` (min `0.000134`)
- selected floor gap recall: `0.014815` (min `-0.037037`)
- RNA->image recall@1: `0.755556`
- image->RNA recall@1: `0.829630`

## Promotion Status
No model is promoted. If the selected scale is zero, this branch confirms that F030's direct JEPA residual is useful for representation and direction learning but not yet safe above the local train-only ridge floor.
